detail.description:
Three Kingdoms Game gives you 1000 spins right from the start, easily allowing you to summon Cao Cao, Guan Yu, Lu Bu, Zhao Yun, and a stunning harem. SamKok Battle - Thousands of spins!!!

Step into the brand new world of the Three Kingdoms - Famous generals gather, stunning beauties serve the Lord, epic battles demand sophisticated tactics. Join now and conquer the Three Kingdoms!

1. 1000 SPINS – RECRUIT FAMOUS 3Q GENERALS – CONSTANTLY CHANGE YOUR TACTICS
Every 10 recruitment spins guarantees
